languages.text: {n}Воодушевленные зарковцы отвечают ему дружным воинским салютом. Себериан кивает вам напоследок и устремляется в одну из боковых галерей.{/n}
{n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Воодушевленные зарковцы отвечают ему дружным воинским салютом. Себериан кивает вам напоследок и устремляется в одну из боковых галерей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians answer him with a unified military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides towards one of the side galleries.{/n}
{n}The inspired Zarkovians answer him with a unified military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides towards one of the side galleries.{/n}
{n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}
{n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

languages.text: {n}受到鼓舞的扎尔科夫人齐刷刷地行了个军礼。塞贝里安向你最后点了下头，便大步走向一侧的长廊。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}受到鼓舞的扎尔科夫人齐刷刷地行了个军礼。塞贝里安向你最后点了下头，便大步走向一侧的长廊。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los zarkovianos, inspirados, responden cuadrándose al unísono. Seberian asiente por última vez y se dirige a una de las galerías laterales.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los zarkovianos, inspirados, responden cuadrándose al unísono. Seberian asiente por última vez y se dirige a una de las galerías laterales.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Enthousiastes, les Zarkoviens répondent à l'unisson par un salut militaire. Seberian vous adresse un dernier signe de tête et s'éloigne à grands pas en direction de l'une des galeries attenantes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Enthousiastes, les Zarkoviens répondent à l'unisson par un salut militaire. Seberian vous adresse un dernier signe de tête et s'éloigne à grands pas en direction de l'une des galeries attenantes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İlham alan Zarkovlular, hep bir ağızdan askerî bir selamla karşılık veriyor. Seberian sana son bir kez başını sallıyor ve yan galerilerden birine doğru yürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İlham alan Zarkovlular, hep bir ağızdan askerî bir selamla karşılık veriyor. Seberian sana son bir kez başını sallıyor ve yan galerilerden birine doğru yürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die beflügelten Zarkovianer antworten mit einem militärischen Salut. Seberian nickt dir ein letztes Mal zu und schreitet auf eine der Nebengalerien zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die beflügelten Zarkovianer antworten mit einem militärischen Salut. Seberian nickt dir ein letztes Mal zu und schreitet auf eine der Nebengalerien zu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコビアンたちは、軍礼で応答する。セベリアンは、最後の頷きを送り、側廊の一つへと歩みを進める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The inspired Zarkovians respond in unison with a military salute. Seberian gives you a final nod and strides toward one of the side galleries.{/n}
